title: oxytropis gaudinii subsp. pyrenaica
intro: Oxytropis gaudinii subsp. pyrenaica, also known as Pyrenean burnet, is a flowering plant in the legume family Fabaceae. Traditionally, it is used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating coughs, respiratory issues, and inflammation, due to its high content of alkaloids and glycosides. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and acting as an expectorant, making it a popular choice in herbal medicine. Oxytropis gaudinii subsp. pyrenaica can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various forms.
